hero_title: Report pollution hotspots before they spread
hero_description: SwachhVayu combines citizen photos, local sensor readings, and satellite context to detect street-level smoke, dust, and waste burning, then turns them into action-ready municipal alerts.
how_it_works_subtitle: From street report to field deployment in one workflow.
jury_snapshot_title: Built for citizens to report and officials to act.
hotspot_preview_no_alerts: No active pollution alerts in Delhi NCR right now.
map_description: Verified reports, sensor flags, and predicted risk zones across Delhi NCR.
map_feed_empty_desc: Citizen reports with pollution signals will appear here after classification.
report_description: Upload a photo, tag what you see, and share location context. SwachhVayu validates the report with AI, local sensors, and satellite signals before alerting municipal responders.
report_what_happens_step1: Stored as a hosted URL before the report is saved.
report_what_happens_step2: Location is matched with sensors and known risk zones.
report_what_happens_step3: Photo is classified for smoke, dust, fire, or emission.
report_what_happens_step4: Verified hotspots are pushed to the municipal dashboard.
report_form_what_seeing_hint: Smoke, dust, flame, or visible haze works best.
dashboard_description: Live hotspot verification, dispatch decisions, and escalation tracking across Delhi NCR.
command_feed_description: Dispatch based on severity, confidence, local exposure, and forecasted spread.
command_feed_empty_desc: Turn on demo incidents to preview the dashboard with sample data.
command_signals_empty_title: No raw citizen reports waiting for corroboration.
command_signals_empty_desc: Promoted Firestore incidents will appear here as soon as the corroboration threshold is crossed.
command_detail_unverified_desc1: Live Firestore report has not received validation evidence yet.
command_detail_unverified_desc2: Fusion confidence will appear after Gemini, CPCB, and satellite evidence are written to Firestore.
command_detail_resolve_confirm_desc: This will remove it from active incident views but preserve it in the database for auditing.
forecast_select_cell_desc: H3 resolution-7 cells across Delhi NCR
forecast_chart_subtitle: Teal = recent actuals · Indigo dashed = heuristic forecast
forecast_api_desc: Returns JSON with 24-hour forecast, AQI metadata, trend, covariate nudge, and a human-readable summary.
aqi_desc_good: Air quality is satisfactory. Little or no risk.
aqi_desc_satisfactory: Acceptable air quality. Sensitive groups may notice minor symptoms.
aqi_desc_poor: Everyone may begin to experience health effects.
aqi_desc_very_poor: Health alert — everyone may experience serious effects.
aqi_desc_severe: Emergency conditions. Entire population is likely affected.
engine_wind_note: Wind conditions may help disperse pollutants.
engine_summary_rise: PM2.5 expected to rise to {peakValue} µg/m³ by {peakHour}. Currently {trendNote}{covNote}{windNote}
engine_summary_fall: PM2.5 expected to fall to {peakValue} µg/m³ by {peakHour}. Currently {trendNote}{covNote}{windNote}
engine_summary_remain: PM2.5 expected to remain near {peakValue} µg/m³ by {peakHour}. Currently {trendNote}{covNote}{windNote}
workflow_step1_text: Residents submit smoke, dust, or burning-waste reports with photo and location context.
workflow_step2_text: Gemini checks visual signals while sensors, satellite context, and nearby reports raise confidence.
workflow_step3_text: Officials receive a ranked incident queue with suggested crews, mist cannons, and cleanup actions.
report_form_hint_example: Example: black smoke from garbage pile near service road, strong smell, visible since 8:30 AM
report_form_use_gps: Use GPS, enter details manually, or open the map picker.
hazard_garbage_fire_desc: Smoke or flames near waste piles
hazard_traffic_smog_desc: Dense fumes at a road junction
hazard_construction_dust_desc: Dust plume from digging or debris
hazard_industrial_emission_desc: Stack smoke, odor, or chemical haze
forecast_summary_rise: PM2.5 expected to rise to {peakValue} µg/m³ by {peakHour}. Currently {trendNote}{covNote}.{windNote}
forecast_summary_fall: PM2.5 expected to fall to {peakValue} µg/m³ by {peakHour}. Currently {trendNote}{covNote}.{windNote}
forecast_summary_remain: PM2.5 expected to remain near {peakValue} µg/m³ by {peakHour}. Currently {trendNote}{covNote}.{windNote}
forecast_wind_help: Wind conditions may help disperse pollutants.
footer_affiliation: An official initiative by the government of India.
ambient_scan_refresh_title: Refresh automatic sensor and satellite scan
ambient_scan_complete: Auto scan complete: {active} active from {scanned} checks
live_data_error_suffix: incidents may be missing or stale. Check the console / Firestore rules and indexes.
action_dispatch_inspection: Dispatch inspection team to confirm source
unverified_signal_detail_single: {count} citizen report received. Waiting for the promotion threshold (3 reports) or sensor/satellite confirmation before municipal escalation.
unverified_signal_detail_plural: {count} citizen reports received. Waiting for the promotion threshold (3 reports) or sensor/satellite confirmation before municipal escalation.
alert_reason_auto_no_citizen: Sensor or satellite evidence crossed the pollution threshold; no citizen report yet.
alert_reason_citizen_promoted: Citizen reports were corroborated by nearby evidence and crossed the promotion threshold.
